name: RPlog_Forcing_A_Gem_of_Knowledge
title: Forcing a Gem of Knowledge
summary: Aboard the freighter Trader's Envy on the outskirts of the Corellian system, the crime lord Tyy'sun Eson holds the captured Jedi Padawan Ai'kani, who has been sentenced to death but kept alive as both his prisoner and unwitting muse. Since a coma, Tyy'sun has been awakening to the Force through spice-induced meditation, and he presses the weakened Ai'kani to teach him, offering to spare her life and return the child Yejide in exchange for instruction. Through their charged exchange, Ai'kani patiently explains that the Force is neutral and cannot be seized through greed, recounting her own dark upbringing under a false father and her hard turn toward the light. Tyy'sun unbinds her, leaves food, and threatens Yejide's life via a remote agent to ensure her cooperation, but Ai'kani refuses to truly train him, judging him too ignorant and brash. Rebinding her hands above her head, Tyy'sun departs to meet a new potential recruit at the starport as the Trader's Envy moves toward Corellia, leaving Ai'kani to quietly rebuild her strength.
